title: Graph-based benchmarking for MOF synthesizability and stability proxies

dataset_routes.rationale: Most defensible open starting point because it provides experimentally extracted MOF stability labels linked to CoRE-MOF structures.
blocking_questions: Can the label set be mapped cleanly into a binary or ordinal benchmark task?
What class balance and coverage remain after filtering?

dataset_routes.rationale: Closer to synthesizability framing, but may be harder to reproduce and may rely on threshold assumptions.
blocking_questions: Is the threshold scientifically defensible for an MVP benchmark?

falsification_rule: Reject the H10 claim if graph models fail to outperform simpler baselines on a defensible proxy target or if the target labels cannot be justified scientifically.
